title: 5 Must-Buy Stocks at 52-Week High With More Upside for 2024
text: We have narrowed our search to five large-cap stocks with more upside for 2024. These are: IT, PGR, CBOE, IHG, NVO.

title: 3 Stocks to Buy From the Booming Consulting Services Industry
text: With service activities remaining healthy, the Zacks Consulting Services industry is poised to prosper. IT, FCN and HURN are three stocks that are well-placed to ride the demand strength.

title: Is Gartner (IT) Outperforming Other Business Services Stocks This Year?
text: Here is how Gartner (IT) and MoneyLion Inc. (ML) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: All You Need to Know About Gartner (IT) Rating Upgrade to Buy
text: Gartner (IT) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: Why Gartner Stock Popped Today
text: Gartner beat expectations on revenue, earnings and free cash flow in the third quarter. The technology research and consulting firm repurchased over $200 million in shares while increasing its buyback authorization by $500 million.

title: Gartner (IT) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Gartner's (IT) revenues increase year over year in the third quarter of 2023, driven by improvement in segmental results.

title: IT consultant Gartner's stock rockets to a record as uncertainty and volatility fuel big earnings beat
text: Shares of Gartner Inc. blasted off into record territory Friday after the information-technology research and consulting company reported third-quarter earnings that beat by a wide margin and raised the full-year outlook, as the company benefited from an uncertain macroenvironment.

title: Gartner (IT) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Gartner (IT) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Gartner (IT) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Gartner (IT) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.56 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.86 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.41 per share a year ago.

title: Gartner Reports Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) today reported results for the third quarter of 2023 and updated its financial outlook for the full year 2023.

title: Why Earnings Season Could Be Great for Gartner (IT)
text: Gartner (IT) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
